positive: A minimalist, geometric illustration of a stylized astronaut floating in deep space. The astronaut is depicted in a clean, silhouetted pose against a swirling nebula background. The style should be a harmonious blend of mid-century modern design and Japanese Ukiyo-e woodblock print aesthetics. Use a restricted color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, creamy off-white, and matte gold accents. The composition must be highly symmetrical, centralizing the figure and creating strong visual contrast between the sharp silhouette and the soft, gradient background. The print must be vector-friendly, crisp, and scalable, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Ensure clean lines and visible negative space.
negative: blur, noise, artifacts, low resolution, watermark, text, logo, signature, bad anatomy, distorted, extra limbs, ugly, messy, jpeg artifacts
